title: CubicFun Baby Crawling dinosaur toys for boys Baby Toys Musical Light Interactive Walking Sensory Toys Sound Toys Birthday Present Gifts for Kids Toddler Age12 months+ 1 2 3 Years Old (Green)
features: 【Encourage Baby to Crawl & Build Muscle】The dinosaur toy moves, plays music & lights up when touched. It encourages babies to crawl and build muscle, promoting gross motor skill development. Perfect choice as baby toys 12 months plus, gifts toys for 1 2 year old girls boys.

【Touch and Go & Obstacle Avoidance】The toy uses touch-sensor technology and has wheels that help it avoid obstacles, making it easy and safe for babies to play with. It also has an auto shut-off to save battery and can be restarted after.

【Two Engaging Play Modes for Extended Fun】：Featuring a “Go mode” that will surely inspire your 12 month old baby to crawl and chase after the toy, and a “Stop mode” that transforms it into an adorable toy pet suitable for 1 year old, 18 or 24 month old children, this toy provides endless entertainment. Touching the sensor triggers sounds and lights, which are great for enhancing hand - eye coordination and fine motor skills. Its compact size is perfect for little hands at every age stage, and it's highly portable, making it easy to take along on trips. It's truly one of the top toys to encourage crawling for babies of all these ages.

【Musical Toy with Lighting】This toddler toy plays a variety of songs and dinosaur sounds when in moving, promoting auditory development. The sounds and music help with auditory and rhythm development, while the soft lights aid in visual development. The volume can be adjusted, making it a helpful function for parents to protect a baby's hearing.

【Excellent Quality and Safe】Made of non-toxic ABS with polished edges and contains no small parts, making it safe for babies to play with. It's also sturdy and shatterproof, ensuring long-lasting performance. The toy is safe to put in the mouth and requires 3 AAA batteries (not included).
